name: RenameItems
author: Wertzui123
description: A simple rename plugin for PocketMine-MP servers.
readme_markdown:
# RenameItems
A simple rename plugin for PocketMine-MP servers.
The .phar can be found on poggit. # Commands | Command | Description | Usage | Aliases | Permission | |---------|------------------------------------------------|------------------------|-------------|----------------------------| | rename | Rename the item in your hand | /rename | / | renameitems.command.rename | | block | Block the item in your hand from being renamed | /block | blockrename | renameitems.command.block | **All commands can be configured in the config file.** # Permissions | Permission | Description | Default | |---------------------------------|------------------------------------|---------| | renameitems.command.rename | Permission for /rename | op | | renameitems.command.block | Permission for /block | op | | renameitems.blockeditems.bypass | Allows you to rename blocked items | false | # Features * Highly customizable * Automatic config updater * UIs * Items can be blocked from being renamed # Support You can contact me in my discord server or create an issue. # License and Copyright RenameItems is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. For more information: https://choosealicense.com/licenses/gpl-3.0
© 2019 - 2023 Wertzui123 # Credits RenameItems was written by @Wertzui123.
